_meta.h2_note: Each variant includes an `h2` field for the section heading and a `body` field for the paragraph. Use h2 as the <h2> tag text and body as the paragraph below it. Both fields support placeholders.
_meta.selection_rule: Index = post_id mod 8. Same index used consistently per page across all sections.
